property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;c:\Users\Dwith\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\Dwith\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Users\Dwith\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-11.0.18.10-hotspot in;C:\Program Files\Microsoft\jdk-11.0.18.10-hotspot in;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\110\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\110\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\110\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\110\Tools\Binn\ManagementStudio\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio 10.0\Common7\IDE\PrivateAssemblies\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\110\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft\Web Platform Installer\;C:\opt\apache-maven-3.8.6 in;C:\Program Files\7-Zip;C:\Users\Dwith\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;C:\Users\Dwith\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk;C:\Program Files (x86)\Yarn in\;C:\Android\Sdk\emulator;C:\Android\Sdk	ools;C:\Android\Sdk	ools in;C:\Android\Sdk\platform-tools;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Users\Dwith\AppData\Roaming

odejs\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 in;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Git LFS;C:\opt\apache-maven-3.8.6;C:\Users\Dwith\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\Dwith\AppData\Local\Yarn in;C:\Users\Dwith\.dotnet	ools;C:\Users\Dwith\AppData\Roaming
